tools.name: get_convergence_picks
tools.description: Today's top scored catalyst picks from the Catalyst Edge convergence model. Optional filters: conviction, sector. Free tier returns the top 3.

tools.name: get_ticker_signal
tools.description: Full convergence breakdown for one ticker — every non-zero signal layer and its points, plus the score and conviction.

tools.name: get_thesis
tools.description: Plain-language thesis for a ticker — quantitative read, catalysts, risks, bear case. Covers the top convergence picks.

tools.name: get_sector_lean
tools.description: Orphan-aggregated sector lean — the directional signal each sector is showing, from ~480 aggregated data spokes.

tools.name: get_options_context
tools.description: Live options context for a ticker via Tradier — nearest expiration, ATM call/put prices, straddle cost. Use to choose an options strategy.

tools.name: get_track_record
tools.description: Historical hit-rate and alpha of Catalyst Edge pick lists — the evidence an agent uses to weight the signal. Optional: list_name filter.
